title: Temple Festival Calendar
meta_description: The annual festival calendar of Arunachaleswarar Temple, Tiruvannamalai, listing major utsavams across all twelve Tamil months from Chitrai to Panguni.
body_html:
Festival Calendar

Chitrai (April-May)

Chitirai Vasantha Urchavam (10 days)

Vaikasi (May-June)

Vaikasi Urchavam (1 day)

Ani (June-July)

Ani Bramorchavam (10 days)

Ani Thirumanjanam (Lord Nataraja Urchavam - 1 day)

Adi (July-August)

Adi Pooram Bramorchavam (10 days)

Avani (August-September)

Avani Moolam Urchavam (1 day)

Puratasi (September-October)

Navarathri Urchavam (9 days)

Aippasi (October-November)

Annabisheka Urchavam (1 day)

Kanda Sashti Urchavam (6 days)

Karthigai (November-December)

Karthigai Deepa Bramorchavam (17 days)

Margazhi (December-January)

Vaikunda Ekadasi Urchavam (1 day)

Arudra Darisanam (Lord Nataraja Urchavam - 1 day)

Thai (January-February)

Uthrayana Punyakala Bramorchavam (10 days)

Thiruvoodal Urchavam (1 day)

Manalurpettai Theerthavari Urchavam (1 day)

Kalasapakkam (Rathasapthami) Theerthavari Urchavam (1 day)

Masi (February-March)

Maha Shivaratri Urchavam

Masi Makam Pallikondpattu Theerthavari Urchavam

Panguni (March-April)

Panguni Uthiram Thirukalyana Urchavam (6 days)
notes: No hero image on this page. Calendar structured as month headings with festival entries. No inline images.
